entries.query: How do I add a new route to my Flask app that responds to POST requests?
entries.notes: Routing question that should route to the API surface reference. Tests the most common Flask question shape — a developer adding an endpoint.

entries.query: I want to organize my routes into separate files. What's the right pattern?
entries.notes: Blueprint question phrased without naming the feature — exercises whether the navigator routes on intent rather than on Flask jargon.

entries.query: How do I write a Flask extension that other apps can install with init_app()?
entries.notes: Extension-authoring question. Tests routing to the plugins reference and discriminates from API-surface questions.

entries.query: Can my plugin hook into what happens after every request is finished?
entries.notes: Cross-system question (request teardown is in api, but the extension authoring perspective lives in plugins). Per the Cross-reference map, plugins is the entry point.
